textByHash.06631c9781e0d55b978f2b9c11b0d69477c84302: Quite. Perhaps I'll see you around...
textByHash.0d50cc769e3da0d99243ea5fd5008bb3171a73b7: Indeed! A family heirloom of mine, passed down from my father.
textByHash.713ff89c7fb6c5b7877df1196e59e708f23ca058: Well... I think it's quite nice! I prefer a warm cup of Saradomin's Wisdom, a special recipe of mine.
textByHash.7cffff605db15fe2f6729207aecd6ba401971f8c: Afternoon. I'm Morgiana, and by all means, let yourself in...
textByHash.7f41f9ae3596f755eab8ea268c93a75f2d17192b: Oh, nothing... it's just... old memories. I'm getting old, as you can probably see. My family have all died to war. This is meant to be my retirement.
textByHash.bce5f1e98c5d8bd76a47f95d5bc188a22b9ca439: Bit of a family secret. A fine blend of herbs that are quite magical.
textByHash.e543c632cdd98c9104f324c07cb030b93e48ac83: I find it's best to be prepared in this region. Bandits regularly visit this fine oasis, and they ask fewer questions when they see me in armour.
